export const summerDestinations = [
  {
    id: 1,
    name: "Kashmir Paradise",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1605640840605-14ac1855827b?w=600",
    price: "₹24,999",
    duration: "5N / 6D",
    description: "Experience the heaven on earth with stunning Dal Lake, houseboat stays, and snow-capped mountains.",
    badge: "Most Popular",
    hotel: "Houseboat + 3-Star Hotel",
    transport: "Flight + Local Cab",
    inclusions: ["Flights", "Hotel", "Sightseeing", "Meals", "Guide"],
    rating: 4.8,
    reviews: 1420,
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    name: "Manali Escape",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1626621341517-bbf3d9990a23?w=600",
    price: "₹18,499",
    duration: "4N / 5D",
    description: "Adventure in the Himalayas — river rafting, snow sports, and the iconic Rohtang Pass.",
    badge: "Adventure",
    hotel: "4-Star Mountain Resort",
    transport: "Volvo Bus + Local Cab",
    inclusions: ["Hotel", "Sightseeing", "Meals", "Transfers"],
    rating: 4.7,
    reviews: 980,
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    name: "Goa Beach Holiday",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1512343879784-a960bf40e7f2?w=600",
    price: "₹15,999",
    duration: "3N / 4D",
    description: "Sun, sand, and surf! Enjoy vibrant beaches, water sports, and the legendary Goa nightlife.",
    badge: "Honeymoon Special",
    hotel: "Beach Resort 4-Star",
    transport: "Flight + Cab",
    inclusions: ["Flights", "Hotel", "Breakfast", "Sightseeing"],
    rating: 4.6,
    reviews: 2100,
  },
  {
    id: 4,
    name: "Jaipur Royal Tour",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1477587458883-47145ed94245?w=600",
    price: "₹12,999",
    duration: "3N / 4D",
    description: "Explore the Pink City — Amber Fort, Hawa Mahal, City Palace, and camel rides in the desert.",
    badge: "Heritage",
    hotel: "Heritage Haveli Hotel",
    transport: "Flight + Cab",
    inclusions: ["Hotel", "Sightseeing", "Breakfast", "Guide"],
    rating: 4.5,
    reviews: 760,
  },
  {
    id: 5,
    name: "Kerala Backwaters",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1602216056096-3b40cc0c9944?w=600",
    price: "₹21,999",
    duration: "5N / 6D",
    description: "Glide through tranquil backwaters on a houseboat, explore spice plantations, and unwind in Munnar.",
    badge: "Recommended",
    hotel: "Houseboat + Jungle Resort",
    transport: "Flight + Local Cab",
    inclusions: ["Flights", "Houseboat", "All Meals", "Sightseeing"],
    rating: 4.9,
    reviews: 1850,
  },
  {
    id: 6,
    name: "Rishikesh Adventure",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1585136917228-b6bf0fed8fe2?w=600",
    price: "₹9,999",
    duration: "2N / 3D",
    description: "White-water rafting, bungee jumping, cliff jumping, and yoga retreats in the yoga capital of the world.",
    badge: "Thrill Seekers",
    hotel: "Camp + Guesthouse",
    transport: "Bus + Cab",
    inclusions: ["Stay", "Rafting", "Bungee", "Meals"],
    rating: 4.7,
    reviews: 540,
  },
];

export const exploreDestinations = [
  {
    id: 7,
    name: "Ladakh Odyssey",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1635011657818-ee5e71a6617a?w=600",
    price: "₹32,999",
    duration: "7N / 8D",
    category: "Adventure",
    description: "High-altitude desert landscapes, monasteries, Pangong Lake, and the world's highest motorable roads.",
    badge: "Most Booked",
    hotel: "Camp + Boutique Hotel",
    transport: "Flight + SUV",
    inclusions: ["Flights", "Hotel", "All Meals", "Bike Rental", "Permits"],
    rating: 4.9,
    reviews: 1230,
  },
  {
    id: 8,
    name: "Agra Taj Mahal",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1548013146-72479768bada?w=600",
    price: "₹7,499",
    duration: "1N / 2D",
    category: "Heritage",
    description: "Witness the eternal symbol of love — the Taj Mahal at sunrise, Agra Fort, and Fatehpur Sikri.",
    badge: "Value",
    hotel: "4-Star City Hotel",
    transport: "Train + Cab",
    inclusions: ["Hotel", "Breakfast", "Taj Entry", "Guide"],
    rating: 4.6,
    reviews: 3200,
  },
  {
    id: 9,
    name: "Varanasi Spiritual",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1561361513-2d000a50f0dc?w=600",
    price: "₹10,499",
    duration: "3N / 4D",
    category: "Spiritual",
    description: "Experience the ancient spiritual city — Ganga Aarti, boat rides, ghats, and temple visits.",
    badge: "Spiritual",
    hotel: "Heritage Hotel",
    transport: "Train + Rickshaw",
    inclusions: ["Hotel", "Aarti Tour", "Boat Ride", "Breakfast"],
    rating: 4.8,
    reviews: 890,
  },
  {
    id: 10,
    name: "Darjeeling Hills",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1558431382-27e303142255?w=600",
    price: "₹14,999",
    duration: "4N / 5D",
    category: "Hill Station",
    description: "Tea gardens, the Toy Train, Tiger Hill sunrise, and panoramic views of Kanchenjunga.",
    badge: "Scenic",
    hotel: "Tea Estate Resort",
    transport: "Flight + Train + Cab",
    inclusions: ["Flights", "Hotel", "Toy Train", "Breakfast"],
    rating: 4.7,
    reviews: 670,
  },
  {
    id: 11,
    name: "Andaman Islands",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1544551763-46a013bb70d5?w=600",
    price: "₹27,999",
    duration: "5N / 6D",
    category: "Beach",
    description: "Crystal clear waters, Radhanagar Beach, scuba diving, snorkeling, and pristine islands.",
    badge: "Beach Getaway",
    hotel: "Beach Resort",
    transport: "Flight + Ferry",
    inclusions: ["Flights", "Hotel", "Scuba", "Island Tour", "Meals"],
    rating: 4.8,
    reviews: 1100,
  },
  {
    id: 12,
    name: "Rann of Kutch",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1609920658906-8223bd289001?w=600",
    price: "₹16,999",
    duration: "3N / 4D",
    category: "Cultural",
    description: "The great white salt desert, tribal villages, folk music, and the magical Rann Utsav festival.",
    badge: "Cultural",
    hotel: "Tent City",
    transport: "Flight + Jeep",
    inclusions: ["Tent Stay", "Cultural Show", "Meals", "Jeep Safari"],
    rating: 4.6,
    reviews: 430,
  },
];

export const services = [
  {
    id: 1,
    title: "Honeymoon Packages",
    icon: "bi-heart-fill",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1518998053901-5348d3961a04?w=500",
    description: "Create memories that last a lifetime with our handpicked romantic escapes — from Maldives to Paris.",
    color: "#FF4E8A",
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    title: "India Tour Packages",
    icon: "bi-map-fill",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1524492412937-b28074a5d7da?w=500",
    description: "Discover the incredible diversity of India — from the Himalayas to the backwaters, all covered.",
    color: "#FF6B35",
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    title: "Family Tour Packages",
    icon: "bi-people-fill",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1506905925346-21bda4d32df4?w=500",
    description: "Fun-filled family holidays with kid-friendly activities, comfortable stays, and hassle-free planning.",
    color: "#1A4ED8",
  },
  {
    id: 4,
    title: "Adventure Trips",
    icon: "bi-lightning-fill",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1551632811-561732d1e306?w=500",
    description: "For the thrill-seeker in you — trekking, rafting, skydiving, and more across India.",
    color: "#6C2BD9",
  },
  {
    id: 5,
    title: "Hill Station Tours",
    icon: "bi-snow",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1464822759023-fed622ff2c3b?w=500",
    description: "Breathe in fresh mountain air at India's most beautiful hill stations — Shimla, Ooty, Darjeeling and beyond.",
    color: "#00B4D8",
  },
];

export const heroSlides = [
  {
    id: 1,
    destination: "Kashmir",
    tagline: "Heaven on Earth",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1605640840605-14ac1855827b?w=1400&q=80",
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    destination: "Goa",
    tagline: "Sun, Sand & Bliss",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1512343879784-a960bf40e7f2?w=1400&q=80",

  },
  {

    destination: "Jaipur",
    tagline: "The Pink City",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1477587458883-47145ed94245?w=1400&q=80",
  },
  {
    id: 5,
    destination: "Kerala",
    tagline: "God's Own Country",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1602216056096-3b40cc0c9944?w=1400&q=80",
  },
  {
    id: 6,
    destination: "Ladakh",
